name: streamdeck-url-data-fetcher
description: Stream Deck plugin for fetching JSON from URLs and rendering live data tiles.

scripts.build: npm run icons:generate && npm run assets:generate && node scripts/build.mjs
scripts.build:free: npm run icons:generate && npm run assets:generate && node scripts/build.mjs --variant=free
scripts.build:premium: npm run icons:generate && npm run assets:generate && node scripts/build.mjs --variant=premium
scripts.sd:dev:free: npm run build:free && node scripts/streamdeck-dev.mjs dev free
scripts.sd:dev:premium: npm run build:premium && node scripts/streamdeck-dev.mjs dev premium
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build
